titleStmt.title: SII 15.98: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 98. (B.K. No. 36 of 1930-31.) YALVĀR, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a broken slab set up in front of the chāvaḍi.
This is dated the 3rd regnal year of the king, Bahudhānya, Mārgaśira śu. 5 Sunday, corresponding to 1158 A.D., November 28. The weekday, however was Friday.

It records that Nāraṇadēva Chauvarasa, the Prabhu of Jarevaṭṭhe, made a gift of land, after purchase, to the god Gavaṟēśvara of Ēḷāpura. The earlier part of the epigraph which is damaged refers to gifts by the Five Hundred Mahājanas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
damaged
battukayya
[Ē]ḷāpurada kaḷave
ṟēsvaradēva¨rgge biṭa dēvara
ḷa gāṇadalu soṭige yeṇne
ge 25 hāga Aḍake 10 hēḍeṁgaṁ
ttiya maḷave Āydu hatti Antinitu
maṁ Aynū¨rvvaru biṭṭaru . svasti śrīmatu kaḷacu
¨ryya bhujabaḷa cakrava¨rtti tribhuvanaikamalladēva va¨rṣa
da 3 neya bahudhānya saṁvatsarada mā¨rggasira su
ddha 5 Ādivāradaṁdu jarevaṭṭheya prabhu nāra
ṇadēva cauvarasanuṁ Ēḷāpurada gavaṟēsvara dē
vara muṁnte hasuṁbeyikkisi koṁḍu tanna holada sī
meyalu Eḍeya kaṭeya bāgila kolāvurada sī
meyiṁ paḍuvalu biṭṭa keyi māṇikēsvarada mattaru 4
śrīmatu gavaṟēsvaradēva¨rgge biṭṭaru . I dhammamanārō
¨rvvaru kiḍisidavaru vāraṇāsiyalu (.) kavileymaṁ
brāhmaṇarumeṁ vadhisidavaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ
vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā saṣṭhi¨rva¨rṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
śāsanamidāvudelliya śāsanamārittarēke salisuveneṁbī
pātakanā sakaḷaṁ rauravakke gaḷagaḷaniḷiguṁ .
Digital edition of SII 15.98 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
